name: Homemade Snack Cake Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients.
2. Stir with a wire whisk until blended.
3. Divide mixture into 6 portions, about 2 1/3 cups each.
4. Store in containers with tight-fitting lids.
5. Label all containers with date and contents.
6. Store in a cool, dry place.
7. Use within 10-12 weeks.
Makes about 13 1/2 cups of Homemade Snack Cake Mix, or 6 packages.
